headline: The $650 Billion AI Surge Is Here—2 Semiconductor ETFs to Play It
summary: The VanEck Semiconductor ETF (SMH) offers targeted exposure to industry leaders, while iShares' SOXX provides broad exposure to the sector.

headline: Applied Materials, Monolithic Power Systems, MACOM, Seagate, and Western Digital Shares Plummet, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after fears of a global energy price shock hit the semiconductor sector following a sell-off in South Korea's stock market.
